zone_mapping.top_left: Physical drawing of an apple falling towards Earth
zone_mapping.top_right: Physical drawing of a soccer ball being kicked
zone_mapping.bottom_left: Physical drawing of a person doing pull-ups
zone_mapping.bottom_right: Physical drawing of a person doing pull-ups with a bar

visual_analysis.structural_description: The frame is divided into four zones, each containing a physical drawing of a different STEM element. The top left zone shows an apple falling towards Earth, the top right zone shows a soccer ball being kicked, the bottom left zone shows a person doing pull-ups, and the bottom right zone shows a person doing pull-ups with a bar.
visual_analysis.layout: The frame is arranged in a 2x2 grid, with each zone containing a different physical drawing.
visual_analysis.spatial_map: The apple is in the top left zone, the soccer ball is in the top right zone, the person doing pull-ups is in the bottom left zone, and the person doing pull-ups with a bar is in the bottom right zone.
visual_analysis.colors_styles: The apple and soccer ball are drawn with solid lines and solid colors, while the person doing pull-ups and the person doing pull-ups with a bar are drawn with solid lines and white color.
